name: Donetsk Oblast
summary: Heaviest fighting in Ukraine. Russia pressing toward Chasiv Yar and Toretsk. Multiple frontline axes active.

name: Zaporizhzhia Oblast
summary: Static frontline near Robotyne. Ukrainian counteroffensive stalled. Zaporizhzhia NPP remains under Russian control.

name: Kherson Oblast
summary: Dnipro River line of contact. Ukraine holds right bank city; Russia holds left bank. Artillery exchanges ongoing.

name: Kharkiv Oblast
summary: Russian cross-border pressure in northern Kharkiv. Ukraine retains city. Active fighting near Vovchansk.

name: Luhansk Oblast
summary: Nearly fully under Russian occupation. Limited Ukrainian presence near Bilohorivka.

name: Sumy Oblast
summary: Ukraine launched limited cross-border operations into Kursk region (Russia). Sumy city faces drone threats.

name: Mykolaiv Oblast
summary: Mostly liberated after 2022. Frontline stabilized to the east. Occasional Russian missile/drone strikes.

name: Crimea
summary: Fully under Russian occupation since 2014. Ukraine conducting drone/missile strikes on military infrastructure. Kerch Bridge attacked multiple times.
